Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: Oromo (culture or style) [300262478], Lake Turkana and Upper Great Rift Valley styles [300263167], Eastern African [300016434], African by cultural or regional designation [300121001], African (general, continental cultures) [300015647], styles, periods, and cultures by region [300111079], Styles and Periods (hierarchy name) [300015646], Styles and Periods Facet [300264088]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Works produced by the African ethnic group of the same name, inhabiting southwestern Ethiopia primarily and also Kenya.
Úsese para describir obras producidas por el grupo étnico africano de mismo nombre que habita principalmente el sur-oeste de Etiopía, así como también en Kenia.
Te gebruiken om werken te beschrijven van de gelijknamige Afrikaanse etnische groep die voornamelijk leeft in het zuidwesten van Ethiopië, maar ook in Kenia.
指稱主要居住在衣索比亞西南部與肯亞的同名非洲族群的文化風格。

Term_Source.Page: Vol. 13, 107, Almagor, Uri. "The cycle and stagnation of smells: Pastoralists-fishermen relationships in an East African society" (Spring 1987)
